message:
feat(cli): Implement full Commander CLI with all commands

Replaces minimal placeholder with complete CLI implementation:

**Commands Implemented:**
- init: Initialize config and playbook
- context: Get relevant rules for a task
- mark: Record helpful/harmful feedback
- playbook: List/add/remove rules (subcommands)
- stats: Show playbook health metrics
- doctor: System health check
- reflect: Process sessions to extract rules

**Technical Details:**
- Uses Commander.js for argument parsing
- Consistent --json flag across all commands
- Type-safe action handlers with async support
- Imports from modular command files

This enables the full cm (cass-memory) CLI experience:
```bash
cm init              # Setup
cm context "task"    # Get relevant rules
cm mark <id> --helpful/--harmful
cm playbook list
cm stats
cm doctor
cm reflect --days 7
```

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
